versions.version_description: Different chord in chorus, number of intro chords,some parts cues.
I think I explain the outro in more detail.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Girl Crush
Little Big Town

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
I've got a girl crush, hate to admit it but[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I got a heart rush, ain't slowing down[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I got it real bad, want everything she has[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
That smile and that midnight laugh she's giving you now[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
I want to taste her lips, yeah cause they taste like you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
I want to drown myself in a bottle of her perfume[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]
I want her long blonde hair, I want her magic touch[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, cause maybe then you'd want me just as much[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I've got a girl crush          I've got a girl crush[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't get no sleep, I don't get no peace[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Thinking about her under your bed sheets[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
The way that she's whispering, the way that she's pulling you in[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Lord knows I've tried, I can't get her off my mind[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
I want to taste her lips, yeah cause they taste like you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
I want to drown myself in a bottle of her perfume[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]
I want her long blonde hair, I want her magic touch[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, cause maybe then you'd want me just as much[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I've got a girl crush[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
I've got a girl crush, hate to admit it but I got a heart rush[/tab]

It ain't slowing down
